_meta.about: Tunables for Algo_Trading. Standard JSON has no comments; each field includes a help string.
_meta.env_override: For settings.* entries, if the listed env var is set in .env it overrides the value here.

poll_interval_minutes.help: How often the index scheduler polls (minutes).

lookback_bars.help: Bars used for support/resistance and structure (5m index path).

min_confidence.help: Minimum model confidence for directional trade (non-neutral day).

min_confidence_neutral_day.help: Stricter confidence when day bias is neutral.

max_stop_pct.help: Max stop distance (% of spot) for longs.

max_stop_pct_short.help: Max stop distance (% of spot) for shorts.

option_stop_ratio.help: Option premium stop as fraction of entry.

min_day_range_pct.help: Min session range (% of spot) to avoid sideways chop filter.

daily_sl_rupees.help: Daily loss cap (rupees) for dashboard / risk.

default_sl_points.help: Default SL distance in points when not specified.

log_level.help: Logging level (DEBUG, INFO, …). Overridden by env LOG_LEVEL if set.

FAILED_BIAS_VOLUME_MULTIPLIER.help: Failed-bias candle volume vs SMA must exceed this multiple.

FAILED_BIAS_MIN_BARS.help: Minimum bars required for failed-bias volume logic.

FAILED_BIAS_SMA_WINDOW.help: Volume SMA length for bias / vol setups.

FAILED_BIAS_MIN_CONFIDENCE.help: Minimum failed-bias score confidence to allow trade.

FAILED_BIAS_MAX_AGE_BARS.help: Max bars after trigger before failed-bias expires.

FAILED_BIAS_MIN_RUNWAY_BARS.help: Min bars of session left (as bar count) for failed-bias.

FAILED_BIAS_TARGET_RR.help: Fast target RR used in failed-bias structure.

FAILED_BIAS_MAX_STOP_PCT.help: Max stop %% for failed-bias quality filter.

FAILED_BIAS_MINUTES_FROM_OPEN.help: Minutes from open before failed-bias allowed (intraday).

FAILED_BIAS_RSI_BUY_FLOOR.help: RSI floor for BUY-side failed-bias and generic BUY filter.

FAILED_BIAS_RSI_BUY_REGIME.help: RSI regime: BUY needs readings above this (failed-bias 10-bar check).

FAILED_BIAS_RSI_SELL_REGIME.help: RSI regime: SELL needs readings below this.

FAILED_BIAS_RSI_LOOKBACK_CANDLES.help: Prior RSI bars checked for failed-bias regime.

ORB_VARIATION_PCT.help: ORB breakout band: %% variation from opening range high/low.

VOL_EMA_VOLUME_MULTIPLIER.help: Vol+EMA BUY: volume vs prior SMA multiple.

VOL_EMA_NEAR_PCT.help: Vol+EMA BUY: max %% distance from close to nearest EMA.

VOL_EMA_MIN_EXTENDED_CLOSES.help: Min extended 15m closes (history+session) for EMA context.

VOL_EMA_MIN_SESSION_BARS.help: Min session bars for vol+EMA path.

VOL_EMA_SYNTHETIC_CONFIDENCE.help: Floor for synthetic score confidence in vol+EMA BUY.

DIRECTIONAL_MID_RANGE_FRAC.help: Distance from mid of S/R must be below this × range to be mid-range.

FAILED_BIAS_OPTION_SL_RATIO.help: Failed-bias option SL as fraction of option entry.

FAILED_BIAS_OPTION_TARGET_RATIO.help: Failed-bias option target multiple on premium.

PINBAR_WICK_BODY_RATIO.help: Pinbar: wick must be ≥ this × body.

PINBAR_BODY_MAX_RANGE_FRAC.help: Pinbar: body at most this fraction of range.

PINBAR_OPP_WICK_MAX_RATIO.help: Pinbar: opposite wick ≤ this × primary wick.

MAX_WORKERS.help: Parallel workers for intraday FNO scan.

RATE_LIMIT_SEC.help: Delay between API calls per worker (seconds).

VOLUME_BIAS_MULTIPLIER.help: Volume bias candle multiple vs SMA.

ORB_VARIATION_PCT.help: ORB band %% from opening range (stock ORB scan).

BTST_STEP_POINTS.help: BTST limit price step per retry.

OPTION_CHAIN_STRIKE_STEP.help: Strike step when stepping chain (index strikes).

FUT_OI_CHANGE_THRESHOLD_PCT.help: Futures OI change %% to flag up/down.

options_oi_change_abs.help: CE/PE OI change threshold (%%) for directional OI signal.

confidence_offset.help: Added inside confidence = strength - penalty + offset.

CONFIDENCE_AFTER_1345.help: Time factor after 13:45 on expiry day.

PCR_DEV_WEIGHT.help: Weight of PCR deviation in confidence.

TIME_FACTOR_WEIGHT.help: Weight of time factor in confidence.

PCR_OI_EXTREME_BULL.help: PCR OI below → extra bullish probability mass.

PCR_OI_BULL.help: PCR OI below → moderate bullish mass.

PCR_OI_EXTREME_BEAR.help: PCR OI above → extra bearish mass.

PCR_OI_BEAR.help: PCR OI above → moderate bearish mass.

MAX_PAIN_DEV_POINTS.help: Spot vs max pain deviation (points) to add bias.

PROB_NO_FLOOR.help: Floor on probability of no huge move.

DIRECTION_CONF_THRESHOLD.help: Min edge to call direction BULLISH/BEARISH.

DEFAULT_NUM_STRIKES.help: Strikes each side of spot for chain fetch.

NFO_INSTRUMENTS_CACHE_HOURS.help: Refresh NFO instruments cache after this many hours.
